name: Custom platforms & tools
tagline: The software your business needs and that does not exist off the shelf.

packages.name: MVP in 6 weeks
packages.hook: From idea to something working, fast.
packages.problem: Do you have a software idea for your business but do not know where to start? We build the minimum version that already solves the problem, you test it with real customers and we grow from there.
deliverables: Database and deployment ready to use
Something real in your hands in weeks, not months
packages.outcome: You validate your idea with controlled investment and without betting everything at once.

packages.name: Custom platform
packages.hook: The software your business needs and does not exist on the market.
packages.problem: When Excel and generic tools fall short, I build a platform designed around the way you actually work.
deliverables: A complete system in phases (management, dashboards, integrations)
Scalable architecture that grows with your business
Training and documentation for your team
packages.outcome: A single tool where you run everything, with ordered data in real time.

faq.q: How soon do I have something working?
faq.a: With the MVP, in about 6 weeks you already test the core flow with real customers.

faq.q: Does the platform grow with my business?
faq.a: Yes, I build it in phases with a scalable, documented architecture.
